summary: Solid Miller soundboard captures a mixed 1988 Greek run with standout Stuck Inside Mobile and I Will Take You Home, though the performance is uneven.
review: The recording benefits from Charlie Miller’s clean soundboard source, delivering clear mix despite a few early balance quirks. Musically the show is average‑to‑below‑average, with a low‑energy first set but highlights like Stuck Inside Mobile, I Will Take You Home, Bird Song and a brilliant China>Rider solo; Jerry’s occasional lapses (Sugaree, start of China>Rider) keep it from being great.

ai_rating.rationale: Show quality is judged around average (≈2.8/5) while recording quality is good to excellent (≈4.0/5); weighted combination yields ~3.2 stars.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Nice, clear sound thanks to Charlie Miller; early mix a bit off but overall crisp. No major dropouts, though some speaker blow‑outs affect the Terrapin segment.

show_quality.setlist_flow: First set feels low‑energy and uneven, but the second set picks up with strong jams and notable highlights despite occasional lapses.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Forgot lyrics on Sugaree and seemed out of it at the start of China>Rider, but delivered a brilliant solo on China>Rider and solid work on Looks Like Rain.
band_member_comments.Keys: Brent added many keyboard textures and modulations; his contributions are noted especially in transitions.
band_member_comments.Drums: Mickey employed electronic pads/effects, which sound dated to some listeners; speaker issues affected drum presence during Terrapin.
